MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
